title: The Gibbering
description: The psyker screams in pain as uncontrolled Warp energies surge through his unprepared mind.
effect: Challenging (+0) WP test or Stunned for 1d5 rounds.

title: Warp Burn
description: A violent burst of energy from the Warp smashes into the psyker's mind, sending him reeling.
effect: 2d5 Energy damage (ignoring TB and Armour), Stunned for 1d5 rounds.

title: Psychic Concussion
description: With a crack of energy, the psyker is knocked unconscious for 1d5 rounds, and everyone within 3d10 metres must make an Ordinary (+10) Willpower test or be Stunned for one round.
effect: Psyker Unconscious 1d5 rounds. All within 3d10m: Ordinary (+10) WP test or Stunned 1 round.

title: Psy Blast
description: There is an explosion of power and the psyker is thrown 3d10 metres into the air, plummeting to the ground moments later.
effect: Psyker thrown 3d10m into the air, suffers falling damage.

title: Soul Sear
description: Warp power courses through the psyker's body, scorching his soul. The psyker cannot use any psychic powers for the next hour.
effect: Cannot use powers for 1 hour. +2d5 Corruption.

title: Locked In
description: The power cages the psyker's mind in an ethereal prison, tormented by visions of the Warp. The psyker falls to the ground Prone and Unconscious. At the beginning of each of his turns until he breaks free, he must spend a Full Action to make a Difficult (–10) Willpower test. If he succeeds, his mind is freed and restored to his body.
effect: Psyker Prone + Unconscious. Full Action Difficult (–10) WP test each turn to break free.

title: Chronological Incontinence
description: Time warps around the psyker. He winks out of existence and reappears in 1d10 rounds (or one minute in narrative time) in the exact location. He suffers one point of permanent Toughness and Intelligence damage as his body and mind rebel against the experience, and gains 1d5 Corruption points.
effect: Vanishes 1d10 rounds. –1 permanent T and Int. +1d5 Corruption.

title: Psychic Mirror
description: The psyker's power is turned back on him. Resolve the power's effects, but the power targets the psyker instead. If the power is beneficial, it deals 1d10+5 Energy damage (ignoring Armour) to the psyker's Body instead of having its normal effect.
effect: Power targets psyker. If beneficial, 1d10+5 Energy (ignore AP) to Body instead.

title: Warp Whispers
description: The voices of Daemons fill the air within 4d10 metres of the psyker, whispering terrible secrets and shocking truths.
effect: All within 4d10m: Hard (–20) WP test or +1d5 Corruption and equal WP damage. Psyker also takes 1d5+5 WP damage regardless.

title: Vice Versa
description: The psyker's mind is thrown out of his body and into another nearby creature or person. The psyker and a random living creature within 50 metres swap consciousness for 1d10 rounds. Each retains WS, BS, Int, Per, WP, Fel but uses the host body's other characteristics. If either body is slain, the effect ends. Both suffer 1d5 Intelligence damage. If no creatures in range, psyker becomes catatonic for 1d5 rounds (1d10 WP, Int, and Corruption damage).
effect: Body swap with random creature within 50m for 1d10 rounds. Both take 1d5 Int damage.

title: Dark Summoning
description: The Empyrean buckles and tears at the arrogance of the psyker, and a Plaguebearer or another lesser Daemon rips its way into existence within 3d10 metres of the psyker, for a number of rounds equal to 1d5 plus the psyker's Toughness bonus. The psyker's turn immediately ends, and the Daemon takes its turn immediately. It detests the psyker and focuses all attacks on him. If the psyker is slain, it returns to the Warp.
effect: Lesser Daemon summoned within 3d10m for 1d5+TB rounds. Attacks psyker exclusively.

title: Rending the Veil
description: The air vibrates with images of cackling Daemons and the kaleidoscopic fabric of the Warp is rendered visible to mortal eyes. All sentient creatures within 1d100 metres must test against Fear (2). The psyker must test against Fear (4) instead. This effect lasts for 1d5 rounds.
effect: Fear (2) all within 1d100m, Fear (4) for psyker. Lasts 1d5 rounds.

title: Blood Rain
description: A psychic storm erupts, covering an area of 5d10 metres. Each character in range must make a Challenging (+0) Strength test or be knocked Prone. In addition to howling winds and rains of blood, any psychic powers used in the area for 1d5 rounds automatically invoke Perils of the Warp. The psyker gains 1d5+1 Corruption points.
effect: Challenging (+0) S test or Prone within 5d10m. Powers in area auto-Perils for 1d5 rounds. Psyker +1d5+1 Corruption.

title: Cataclysmic Blast
description: The psyker's power overloads, arcing out in great bolts of Warp energy. Each character within 1d10 metres (including the psyker) takes 1d10 Energy damage with a Pen of 5. The psyker may not Dodge this or stop the attack with a force field. All of the psyker's clothing, armour, and gear is destroyed, and he cannot use further powers for 1d5 hours.
effect: 1d10 Energy (Pen 5) within 1d10m (no Dodge/field). Psyker's gear destroyed. No powers for 1d5 hours.

title: Mass Incursion
description: Chaos Furies emerge from the Warp, hungry for souls. Each character within 1d100 metres of the psyker must make a Hard (–20) Willpower test or gain 1d10 Corruption and Insanity points, and suffer 1d10 Willpower damage. Each character who succeeds is attacked physically by a Fury, which departs after 1d5 rounds.
effect: All within 1d100m: Hard (–20) WP test or +1d10 Corruption, +1d10 Insanity, 1d10 WP damage. Success = attacked by Fury for 1d5 rounds.

title: Reality Quake
description: Reality buckles around the psyker, and an area radiating out 3d10 metres is sundered: solid objects alternately rot, burn, and freeze. Everyone and everything in the area suffers a single hit for 2d10 Rending damage that ignores Armour and cannot be Dodged. Warded objects, Daemons, and Untouchables halve the damage.
effect: 2d10 Rending (ignore AP, no Dodge) within 3d10m. Warded/Daemons/Untouchables halve.

title: Grand Incursion
description: A great and terrible Warp entity takes an interest in the psyker's flesh. Use the profile for a Putricifex, Herald of Nurgle (or another suitably powerful Daemon) to represent the attacker, who instantly makes an Opposed Very Hard (–20) Willpower test against the psyker. If the Daemon wins, it possesses the psyker's body for 1 hour per degree by which it won the test. The psyker gains 2d10 Insanity and Corruption points and is controlled by the Daemon until the effect ends. If he dies while possessed, the Daemon physically manifests for the remainder of the effect's duration. If the psyker wins the test, he suffers 2d10 Toughness damage, and forever adds +10 to all rolls on Table 6–2: Psychic Phenomena and Table 6–3: Perils of the Warp, as his polluted body now serves as a Warp conduit.
effect: Opposed Very Hard (–20) WP vs Daemon. Loss = possessed 1 hour/DoF, +2d10 Insanity and Corruption. Win = 2d10 T damage, permanent +10 to phenomena/perils rolls.

title: Annihilation
description: The psyker is immediately burned to ashes by the screaming fires of the Immaterium or dragged into the deepest maelstrom of the Warp. He cannot burn Fate to avert this death and is irrevocably destroyed. There is a chance that a daemonic entity of some sort appears in his place — the type of Daemon is determined by the GM, based on how powerful the psyker was, as more powerful psykers draw more powerful Daemons. The percentage chance that the Daemon appears is equal to the psyker's Willpower characteristic.
effect: Psyker destroyed (cannot burn Fate). WP% chance a Daemon appears in his place.
